kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://api-server:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Verify Get All Patients Successfully

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://api-server:8000/users path_url=/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://api-server:8000/users status=200, reason=OK headers={'date': 'Tue, 21 Apr 2026 17:41:59 GMT', 'server': 'uvicorn', 'content-length': '1484', 'content-type': 'application/json'} body=[{"username":"Film","email":"film@gmail.com","fullname":"Tanapon Ubonthat","tel":"0981010725","status":"Active","last_active":"2026-04-17T16:45:56.431368+00:00","password_hash":"$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$rFWK0XovBaDUmjOGsLYWYg$PAjJ8WYL4/LI6dcCNmA7ksTxoaxHJDMmY+KKpmldLbU","id":1,"role":"Admin","departments":"None","create_date":"2026-04-17T16:45:56.431368+00:00"},{"username":"Bright","email":"Bright@gmail.com","fullname":"Bright","tel":"0123456789","status":"Active","last_active":"2026-04-21T16:37:35.134543+00:00","password_hash":"$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$+z/HOCdEqJUSAgBgLOWcEw$2owyr0CAic5+pNGcF4gHrTPZ86YpZH2mehsLLeg5gpM","id":3,"role":"Admin","departments":"None","create_date":"2026-04-17T16:50:39.547707+00:00"},{"username":"Robot","email":"robottest@gmail.com","fullname":"RobotTest","tel":"1234567890","status":"active","last_active":"2026-04-21T17:29:28.789850+00:00","password_hash":"$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$i3GOMYYwZszZu9faG6MUIg$bHviSg7O5FxwvFaf1Lx5zrTBk2vWj+/B2/PT29uaft8","id":6,"role":"Admin","departments":"BackendDev","create_date":"2026-04-21T17:29:28.789850+00:00"},{"username":"Robot1","email":"robottest1@gmail.com","fullname":"RobotTest","tel":"1234567891","status":"active","last_active":"2026-04-21T17:40:17.182752+00:00","password_hash":"$argon2id$v=19$m=65536,t=3,p=4$2Ps/xxgDQOjdu7f2PofQWg$Ot2wzcBiZyKP8i40fJR9Xl1tQhXdFe29+iMGyCs8HFA","id":11,"role":"Admin","departments":"BackendDev","create_date":"2026-04-21T17:40:17.182752+00:00"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
